name: Jellied Beef Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the broth, water, bay leaf, clove, celery salt, and Worcestershire sauce in a large pot.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Bring mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
4. Strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
5. Dissolve gelatin in cold water according to package instructions.
6. Stir the dissolved gelatin into the strained broth until well combined.
7. Pour the mixture into individual serving bowls or cups.
8. Refrigerate until set, about 2 hours.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
10. Serve chilled for up to 6 servings.
